comments: Approved because the execution contract strictly bounds implementation to producing the roadmap design document at tasks/v0.7-m5-c-review-automation-roadmap.md. The scope explicitly requires a roadmap document that defines boundaries, gating conditions, verification methods, and prevention of rubber-stamp automation. The contract also explicitly marks as out of scope: implementation of actual CI/CD or local automation scripts, modification of existing MCP tools, and modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models, which satisfies the required prohibition on altering active state semantics. The recon packet aligns with this boundary by marking the roadmap document as in scope and actual automation scripts plus active dispatch.json semantic changes as out of scope. The recon packet is less explicit than the contract about MCP tools, but the contract itself covers that requirement clearly and unambiguously.
